overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a sandstorm-swept Night City plaza at night. The player follows an NPC with an umbrella through heavy orange haze, passing neon holographic advertisements and descending into an NCART metro station.

events.description: exits covered stairwell into open foggy plaza

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs following an NPC holding an umbrella

notable_agents.action: NPC with umbrella walking up stairs ahead of player

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase ascending from underground passage
illuminated advertisement with coffee cup graphic and 'TOUGH MORNING' text
dark concrete building facade with horizontal lines
tall metal pole with overhead lighting fixture

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a concrete stairway from a covered underground area, following an NPC with an umbrella. The 'Tough Morning' billboard is visible on the left wall as the player approaches the top of the stairs and transitions into the open plaza above.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with holographic advertisements

events.description: player turns left to view tall buildings with neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking through the foggy plaza following the umbrella-wielding NPC toward the center

notable_agents.action: NPC with umbrella continuing to walk ahead through the plaza

entered.detail: wide open concrete pedestrian area with wet reflective surface
tall palm trees swaying in the wind, partially obscured by fog
large floating holographic advertisements on building facades
tall modern skyscrapers with illuminated windows barely visible through sandstorm

segments.scene_description: The player emerges into a wide open plaza during a sandstorm, with palm trees and holographic advertisements visible through the orange haze. The player follows the NPC forward while turning to observe the towering glass buildings with neon signage on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza corner with bar and metro approach

events.description: approaching the NCART metro station entrance with descending stairs

agents.ego_description: walking toward the metro station entrance while passing the Cirrus bar on the right

entered.detail: outdoor bar with blue neon signage and warm interior lighting
open area leading to underground station stairs with railings
illuminated sign for the NCART metro system above station entrance

segments.scene_description: The player turns right and walks past the Cirrus bar with its blue neon signage, heading toward the NCART metro station entrance. The umbrella NPC is no longer visible as the player approaches the descending stairs into the station.

events.description: entering darker underground area with artificial neon lighting
beginning descent down stairs into metro station

agents.ego_description: walking down the stairs into the underground metro station

entered.detail: long concrete staircase with metal railings leading underground
vertical neon light strips in pink and blue illuminating the stairwell
dark opening at the bottom of the stairs leading to the platform area

segments.scene_description: The player descends into the NCART metro station, leaving the sandstorm behind. The environment shifts to artificial neon lighting with pink and blue illuminated pillars lining the stairs. The camera continues down the long concrete stairway toward the dark tunnel entrance at the bottom.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered underground passage, through a sandstorm-swept urban plaza, and back down into a neon-lit metro station. It begins by ascending a concrete stairway past a Tough Morning billboard, following an NPC with an umbrella toward the surface. As the camera emerges into the open air, the environment shifts into a wide plaza engulfed in a thick orange haze, where palm trees and towering glass buildings with neon signage loom through the storm. The scene then turns right, passing the blue neon glow of the Cirrus bar before the NPC disappears and the camera approaches the NCART station entrance. Finally, the camera descends a long concrete stairway, leaving the sandstorm behind as the lighting transforms into a sequence of pink and blue illuminated pillars leading toward a dark tunnel.
